---
layout: cv
title: "Luis Rivera - Resume"
author: "Luis Rivera"
date: today
---

Luis Rivera  
3039606369 | lrivera30ds@gmail.com | [linkedin.com/in/luisrivera98](https://linkedin.com/in/luisrivera98)  

# Areas of Expertise

- Algorithm tools  
- Design metrics  
- Object-oriented programming  
- Data spreadsheet summarization  
- Probability distributions  
- Hypothesis testing  
- R programming  
- Statistical testing  
- Data analysis/evaluation  
- Regression modeling  
- Research techniques  
- Research design  
- Process planning  
- Quality management  
- Forecasting tools  
- Policy analysis  
- SQL commands, joins  
- Database design  
- Data merging  
- HTML proficiency  
- CSS styling proficiency  

# Education

## Bachelor of Arts in Public Policy and Administration
**Brigham Young University - Idaho** | Rexburg, ID  
**Sep 2018 - Dec 2021**  
- Emphasis in Public Administration  
- **GPA:** 3.89  
- Academic Scholarship - Thomas E. Ricks Grant  

## Bachelor of Science in Data Science Online Coursework
**Brigham Young University - Idaho** | Rexburg, ID  
**Aug 2024 - Present**  
- Additional courses taken through the BYU-I BS in Data Science major as prerequisite coursework for MS in Data Science.  

# Professional Experience

## Admin Analyst I  
**New Jersey Department of Transportation** | Ewing, NJ  
**Jan 2023 - May 2024**  
- Developed internal protocols for managing $3.5 million in annual federal funds related to the Intelligent Transportation Resource Center.
- Managed federal contracts using the Financial Management Information System.
- Conducted research on Intelligent Transportation Systems to improve traffic flow and safety.
- Provided support in developing the annual in-house budget for the Transportation Mobility Research Unit.
- Participated in State Transportation Innovation Council quarterly meetings.

## Instructor Eval/Statistics TA  
**Brigham Young University-Idaho** | Rexburg, ID  
**Apr 2021 - Dec 2021**  
- Assigned grades for student coursework.
- Conducted exam review sessions and tutoring for a class of 50 students.
- Monitored BYU-I online instructor presence for 24 instructors daily.

## Custodian  
**Brigham Young University-Idaho** | Rexburg, ID  
**Jan 2019 - Apr 2020**  
- Performed routine cleaning and maintenance tasks across campus buildings.
- Managed waste disposal and maintained cleanliness in waste areas.
- Assisted with event setups and post-event cleanups.

## Ambassador  
**Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints** | San Fernando, CA  
**Aug 2016 - Jul 2018**  
- Oversaw the well-being of 30 full-time ambassadors.
- Provided community service and humanitarian aid.
- Shared the teachings of Jesus Christ and engaged in religious education.
- Trained ambassadors for missionary life and responsibilities.
